request_payload.exposure_text: I get why people worry about strategic autonomy, but let's be real - we can't just cut ties with our allies overnight. My neighbor's son is in the National Guard, and they're already stretched thin. If we push too hard for independence, who's going to have our back when things get tough? We need a balanced approach that keeps our allies engaged while gradually building our own capabilities. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
